calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on petition changing name. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heald. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The Court grants the decree changing petitioner name which is kept confidential per CCP 1272(b) and will be on record with the Secretary of State. Decree signed in open court.
